languages.text: "Я помогу тебе добраться до Нунциуса. Мы отправимся на Амсанкт, как только найдем способ пройти через врата".
"I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."
languages.original_text: "Я помогу тебе добраться до Нунциуса. Мы отправимся на Амсанкт, как только найдем способ пройти через врата".

traits.locale_text: "I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."
"I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."
"I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."

languages.text: «Le ayudaré a volver con Nuncius. Iremos a Amsanct en cuanto encontremos la forma de atravesar la puerta».
languages.original_text: "I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."

traits.locale_text: «Le ayudaré a volver con Nuncius. Iremos a Amsanct en cuanto encontremos la forma de atravesar la puerta».

languages.text: “我会带你回到努恩修斯那里。只要找到穿过星门的方法，我们就立刻出发去阿姆桑克特。”
languages.original_text: "I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."

traits.locale_text: “我会带你回到努恩修斯那里。只要找到穿过星门的方法，我们就立刻出发去阿姆桑克特。”

languages.text: « Je vais vous aider à retourner auprès de Nuncius. Nous nous rendrons sur Amsanct dès que nous aurons trouvé le moyen de franchir le portail. »
languages.original_text: "I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais vous aider à retourner auprès de Nuncius. Nous nous rendrons sur Amsanct dès que nous aurons trouvé le moyen de franchir le portail. »

languages.text: "Nuncius'a dönmene yardım edeceğim. Geçitten geçmenin bir yolunu bulur bulmaz Amsanct'a gideceğiz."
languages.original_text: "I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'a dönmene yardım edeceğim. Geçitten geçmenin bir yolunu bulur bulmaz Amsanct'a gideceğiz."

languages.text: "Ich werde Euch helfen, zu Nuncius zurückzukehren. Wir gehen nach Amsanct, sobald wir einen Weg durch das Tor finden."
languages.original_text: "I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Euch helfen, zu Nuncius zurückzukehren. Wir gehen nach Amsanct, sobald wir einen Weg durch das Tor finden."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスに戻るのを手伝おう。門を通る道を見つけ次第、アムサンクトに向かう」
languages.original_text: "I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスに戻るのを手伝おう。門を通る道を見つけ次第、アムサンクトに向かう」
